subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto one of Our handmaidens, that she may rejoice in the remembrance of God and be numbered among the devoted ones. O thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی امه من امائنا لتستبشر بذکر الله و تکون من القانتات ان یا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
